request_payload.exposure_text: As a former counterterrorism analyst, I've seen firsthand how outdated security laws leave us vulnerable. We need expanded domestic security powers to stay ahead of evolving threats. The 2024 National Security Review found that 78% of intercepted plots relied on gaps in current surveillance authorities. It's not about civil liberties vs. security - it's about smart, targeted tools that protect us while respecting our values. #SecurityFirst #ModernizeOurDefenses
